zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Bromflete於大約1436年出生在英國越可爾隆德斯波洛時，她的父親Sir Henry de Bromflete11434歲，母親Eleanor FitzHugh43歲。她於大約1452年與Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1493年4月14日在她的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國越可爾隆德斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Bromflete was born about 1436, in Londesborough, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Henry de Bromflete, was 11434 and her mother, Eleanor FitzHugh, was 43. She married Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford about 1452. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 14 April 1493, in her hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Londesborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Bromflete est née environ 1436, à Londesborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry de Bromflete, avait 11434 ans et sa mère, Eleanor FitzHugh, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford environ 1452. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 avril 1493, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Londesborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Bromflete um 1436 in Londesborough, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry de Bromflete 11434 und ihre Mutter Eleanor FitzHugh 43. Sie hat um 1452 Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. April 1493 im Alter von 58 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Londesborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Bromflete(이)가 대략 1436년 영국 요르크실르 론데스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry de Bromflete(은)는 11434세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor FitzHugh(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 대략 1452년 Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1493년 4월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 론데스버루그h에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford aproximadamente 1452. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Bromflete родилась около 1436 г. в местности лондесбороую, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry de Bromflete было 11434 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor FitzHugh, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford около 1452 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 14 апреля 1493 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности лондесбороую, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford aproximadamente 1452. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de abril de 1493, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Londesborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
